exercises.sentence: Todos los días, yo _______ con mi madre por teléfono.
exercises.translation: Every day, I speak with my mother on the phone.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ español en mi clase de idiomas.
exercises.translation: I speak Spanish in my language class.

exercises.sentence: Generalmente, yo _______ de mis problemas con mis amigos.
exercises.translation: Generally, I talk about my problems with my friends.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué _______ tú siempre tan rápido cuando estás nervioso?
exercises.translation: Why do you always speak so fast when you are nervous?

exercises.sentence: Sé que tú _______ varios idiomas con fluidez.
exercises.translation: I know that you speak several languages fluently.

exercises.sentence: Si tienes una duda, _______ con el profesor ahora mismo.
exercises.translation: If you have a doubt, you speak with the teacher right now.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ con sus compañeros durante el almuerzo.
exercises.translation: She talks with her classmates during lunch.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ muy bien inglés y francés.
exercises.translation: He speaks English and French very well.

exercises.sentence: Mi hermano _______ mucho sobre sus viajes recientes.
exercises.translation: My brother talks a lot about his recent trips.

exercises.sentence: Ayer, yo _______ con mi jefe sobre mi nuevo proyecto.
exercises.translation: Yesterday, I spoke with my boss about my new project.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ brevemente con ella en la fiesta de anoche.
exercises.translation: I spoke briefly with her at the party last night.

exercises.sentence: Por fin, yo _______ con el técnico para arreglar el internet.
exercises.translation: Finally, I spoke with the technician to fix the internet.

exercises.sentence: ¿Con quién _______ tú en la reunión de ayer?
exercises.translation: With whom did you speak at yesterday's meeting?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ con el cliente antes de terminar el informe.
exercises.translation: You spoke with the client before finishing the report.

exercises.sentence: Me contaron que tú _______ con el director sobre tu salario.
exercises.translation: They told me that you spoke with the director about your salary.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ con su abuela durante una hora la semana pasada.
exercises.translation: He talked with his grandmother for an hour last week.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ sobre la importancia de reciclar en la conferencia.
exercises.translation: She spoke about the importance of recycling at the conference.

exercises.sentence: El testigo _______ con la policía después del accidente.
exercises.translation: The witness spoke with the police after the accident.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo _______ mucho con mis amigos de la escuela.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I used to talk a lot with my school friends.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ por teléfono mientras caminaba al trabajo todos los días.
exercises.translation: I used to talk on the phone while walking to work every day.

exercises.sentence: Siempre _______ con mi vecino cuando lo veía en el parque.
exercises.translation: I always used to talk with my neighbor when I saw him at the park.

exercises.sentence: Antes, tú _______ con mucha frecuencia con tu hermano.
exercises.translation: Before, you used to talk very frequently with your brother.

exercises.sentence: Cuando vivías en España, ¿_______ tú mucho en español?
exercises.translation: When you lived in Spain, did you use to speak a lot in Spanish?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ constantemente sobre tus planes de vacaciones cuando éramos jóvenes.
exercises.translation: You used to talk constantly about your vacation plans when we were young.

exercises.sentence: Mi abuelo _______ de sus aventuras cuando era joven.
exercises.translation: My grandfather used to talk about his adventures when he was young.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ suavemente cuando leía cuentos para dormir.
exercises.translation: She used to speak softly when she read bedtime stories.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ con entusiasmo sobre su trabajo todos los días.
exercises.translation: He used to talk with enthusiasm about his job every day.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ con él si tuviera su número de teléfono.
exercises.translation: I would speak with him if I had his phone number.

exercises.sentence: En tu situación, yo _______ claramente con el supervisor.
exercises.translation: In your situation, I would speak clearly with the supervisor.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú crees que yo _______ mejor el idioma si practicara diario?
exercises.translation: Do you think I would speak the language better if I practiced daily?

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué _______ tú en esa situación tan difícil?
exercises.translation: What would you say in that very difficult situation?

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ con calma si supieras toda la verdad.
exercises.translation: You would talk with calm if you knew the whole truth.

exercises.sentence: Creo que tú _______ con el gerente para solucionar este problema.
exercises.translation: I think you would speak with the manager to solve this problem.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ con el médico si se sintiera peor mañana.
exercises.translation: She would speak with the doctor if she felt worse tomorrow.

exercises.sentence: Él _______ con su familia para pedir consejos antes de decidir.
exercises.translation: He would speak with his family to ask for advice before deciding.

exercises.sentence: Cualquier persona honesta _______ con la verdad en este juicio.
exercises.translation: Any honest person would speak with the truth in this trial.

exercises.sentence: Mañana, yo _______ con el cliente sobre el nuevo contrato.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow, I will speak with the client about the new contract.

exercises.sentence: Después de la clase, yo _______ con el profesor sobre mi nota.
exercises.translation: After class, I will talk with the teacher about my grade.

exercises.sentence: Yo _______ contigo tan pronto como llegue a casa.
exercises.translation: I will talk with you as soon as I arrive home.

exercises.sentence: Seguro que tú _______ con tus padres sobre el viaje este fin de semana.
exercises.translation: Surely you will speak with your parents about the trip this weekend.

exercises.sentence: Tú _______ mejor el idioma después de practicar este verano.
exercises.translation: You will speak the language better after practicing this summer.

exercises.sentence: ¿_______ tú con el jefe antes de irte de vacaciones?
exercises.translation: Will you speak with the boss before going on vacation?

exercises.sentence: Él _______ con todos los empleados en la reunión de mañana.
exercises.translation: He will speak with all the employees in tomorrow's meeting.

exercises.sentence: Ella _______ con el director para pedir un aumento de sueldo.
exercises.translation: She will speak with the director to ask for a raise.

exercises.sentence: El experto _______ sobre el cambio climático en la conferencia.
exercises.translation: The expert will speak about climate change at the conference.
